channel.title: Whamcloud Community JIRA
channel.description: This file is an XML representation of an issue

item.title: [LU-9771] FLR1: Landing tickets for File Level Redundancy Phase 1
item.description: The HLD is located at: http://wiki.lustre.org/File_Level_Replication_High_Level_Design
item.summary: FLR1: Landing tickets for File Level Redundancy Phase 1

status.description: A resolution has been taken, and it is awaiting verification by reporter. From here issues are either reopened, or are closed.

comments.comment: Landed for 2.11

Oleg Drokin (oleg.drokin@intel.com) merged in patch https://review.whamcloud.com/31047/
Subject: LU-9771 util: rename LCM_FL_NOT_FLR to LCM_FL_NONE
Project: fs/lustre-release
Branch: master
Current Patch Set:
Commit: fa15e5347c2eccd432924e57440829606c7339f6

Andreas Dilger (andreas.dilger@intel.com) uploaded a new patch: https://review.whamcloud.com/31047
Subject: LU-9771 util: rename LCM_FL_NOT_FLR to LCM_FL_NONE
Project: fs/lustre-release
Branch: master
Current Patch Set: 1
Commit: 4b6016da4174896d5fc3a5bea2bfc05d41cde2b9
All subtasks are now closed and patches landed to master for 2.11.0

Moved the following patches as they are seperate follow-up tasks/improvements to the core functionality landed here with the branch merge. We should only land the branch merge to master under this LU number in case of the unlikely event of any revert of follow on patches that would result in the feature ticket reopening.

https://review.whamcloud.com/#/c/30363/ to LU-10418
https://review.whamcloud.com/#/c/30388/ to LU-10420

Bobi Jam (bobijam@hotmail.com) uploaded a new patch: https://review.whamcloud.com/30388
Subject: LU-9771 flr: split a mirror from mirrored file
Project: fs/lustre-release
Branch: master
Current Patch Set: 1
Commit: 6137358d3c91b7bc58e46df5a57d3d3a01cba014

Current Patch Set: 1
Commit: 56d1b2f4281b6f83bc71b383fa3343e95053ccac
